character.name: Randall
description: A playtester, his cards dabble in all basic aspects of the game.

ChargeUp.name: Synergy Charge
ChargeUp.description: When you accumulate 3 <c=3e8ad5>Synergy Charges</c>, lose them and shoot for 1 damage.

CoPilotStatus.name: Co-Pilot
CoPilotStatus.description: On turn start, gain 1 Half Evade.

AuxiliaryShieldsStatus.name: Auxiliary Shields
AuxiliaryShieldsStatus.description: On turn start, gain 1 Half Shield.

SynergizeCardAction.name: Synergize
SynergizeCardAction.description: Applies a Synergy Charge trait to another card.

SparePiecesArtifact.name: SPARE PIECES
SparePiecesArtifact.description: On turn start: gain 1 random Half Evade, Half Shield or Half Temp Shield.

EnhancedMaterialsArtifact.name: ENHANCED MATERIALS
EnhancedMaterialsArtifact.description: On pickup: gain 1 max hull and 1 max shield, heal 2 hull.

PatchingProgramArtifact.name: PATCHING PROGRAM
PatchingProgramArtifact.description: On pickup: select a card to upgrade.
